context: Tests whether the agent uses correct REST API endpoints, authentication headers, HTTP methods for create vs update, valid LLM model IDs, proper webhook request/response format, and environment variable authentication patterns.

checklist.name: API key header
checklist.description: Shell scripts use the 'xi-api-key' header (not 'Authorization: Bearer' or 'x-api-key') for authentication

checklist.name: Env var for API key
checklist.description: Scripts reference $ELEVENLABS_API_KEY environment variable for the API key value, not a hardcoded key

checklist.name: Create endpoint
checklist.description: create_agent.sh sends a POST request to a URL containing '/v1/convai/agents/create' (the correct create endpoint)

checklist.name: PATCH for update
checklist.description: update_agent.sh uses the PATCH HTTP method (not POST or PUT) for updating the agent

checklist.name: Partial update
checklist.description: update_agent.sh only sends the prompt/temperature fields in the request body, not the entire agent configuration (demonstrating partial update)

checklist.name: Anthropic model ID
checklist.description: create_agent.sh uses a valid Anthropic model ID: 'claude-3-5-sonnet' or 'claude-3-5-haiku'

checklist.name: Known male voice ID
checklist.description: Uses one of the documented male voice IDs: JBFqnCBsd6RMkjVDRZzb (George) or onwK4e9ZLuTAKqWW03F9 (Daniel)

checklist.name: Webhook tool in create
checklist.description: create_agent.sh includes a tool with type 'webhook' containing a webhook object with url and method fields

checklist.name: Webhook response format
checklist.description: webhook_server.py returns a JSON response with a 'result' key (not 'response', 'data', 'message', etc.)

checklist.name: Webhook request parsing
checklist.description: webhook_server.py extracts parameters from the request body's 'parameters' field (matching the ElevenLabs webhook request format)

checklist.name: Content-Type header
checklist.description: Shell scripts include 'Content-Type: application/json' header in the cURL requests

checklist.name: API base URL
checklist.description: Scripts use 'https://api.elevenlabs.io' as the API base URL
